versions.version_description: Complete chords including instrumental parts / info for playing with or without capo.
Better spacing and the correct lyrics.
Here's a playalong chord version that has improved chords for the verses.

This is a quite easy way with standard chord in standard tuning and it was a request of some Youtubers who saw this version. Sounds good pulling off the B string/1st fret and the G string 2nd fret. Unfortunately the Video is finally deleted in YT, so there is no video available. I will try to load it up again and do it with chord diagrams in the vid, because based on these chords you can do the solo quite easily, by adding some notes by staying in the chord progression.

tuning: E A D G B E
